zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella de Soulis於1276年出生在蘇格蘭時，她的父親Sir John de Soulis - Guardian of Scotland10歲，母親Hawise Stewart19歲。她和John Keith Marischal of Scotland至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1317年2月18日在英國薩默塞特卡素 加里享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella de Soulis于1276年出生在苏格兰时，她的父亲Sir John de Soulis - Guardian of Scotland10岁，母亲Hawise Stewart19岁。她和John Keith Marischal of Scotland至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1317年2月18日在英国薩默塞特卡素 加里享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Soulis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Greek: possibly a nickname derived from Albanian shul ‘bolt of wood’, figuratively ‘brawny man’ and ‘tall dolt’.
Scottish (Ayrshire): variant of   Soule  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Shaulis
meanings: Altered form of Lithuanian Šaulys: occupational name from šaulys ‘rifleman’. Compare Soulis .

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella de Soulis was born in 1276, in Scotland, her father, Sir John de Soulis - Guardian of Scotland, was 10 and her mother, Hawise Stewart, was 19. She had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with John Keith Marischal of Scotland. She died on 18 February 1317, in Castle Cary, Somerset, England, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella de Soulis est née en 1276, à Écosse, son père, Sir John de Soulis - Guardian of Scotland, avait 10 ans et sa mère, Hawise Stewart, avait 19 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec John Keith Marischal of Scotland. Elle est décédée le 18 février 1317, à Castle Cary, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella de Soulis 1276 in Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John de Soulis - Guardian of Scotland 10 und ihre Mutter Hawise Stewart 19. Sie hatte mit John Keith Marischal of Scotland mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 18. Februar 1317 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Castle Cary, Somerset, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella de Soulis è nata il nel 1276 nel Scotland, sua padre, Sir John de Soulis - Guardian of Scotland, aveva 10 anni e sua madre, Hawise Stewart, aveva 19 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con John Keith Marischal of Scotland. Morì il 18 febbraio 1317, nel Castle Cary, Somerset, England, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella de Soulisが1276年にスコットランドで生まれた時，父Sir John de Soulis - Guardian of Scotlandは10歳，母Hawise Stewartは19歳であった。彼女はJohn Keith Marischal of Scotlandとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1317年2月18日にイギリスソメルセトカストル カーイで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella de Soulis(이)가 1276년 스컷랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Soulis - Guardian of Scotland(은)는 10세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hawise Stewart(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 John Keith Marischal of Scotland(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1317년 2월 18일 영국 서머세트 카스틀 카리에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella de Soulis nasceu em 1276, em Scotland, seu pai, Sir John de Soulis - Guardian of Scotland, tinha 10 anos e sua mãe, Hawise Stewart, tinha 19 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com John Keith Marischal of Scotland. Ela faleceu em 18 de fevereiro de 1317, em Castle Cary, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella de Soulis родилась в 1276 г. в местности Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir John de Soulis - Guardian of Scotland было 10 лет, а матери, которую звали Hawise Stewart, 19. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от John Keith Marischal of Scotland. Она умерла 18 февраля 1317 г. в местности кастл кэри, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabella de Soulis nació en 1276, en Scotland, su papá, Sir John de Soulis - Guardian of Scotland, tenía 10 años y su mamá, Hawise Stewart, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con John Keith Marischal of Scotland. Murió el 18 de febrero de 1317, en Castle Cary, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 41 años.
